name: loyalty-app-platform
description: Root task runner for loyalty-app local platform workflows

scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: python -c "print('Backend build step not configured yet')"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: python -c "print('Backend lint step not configured yet')"
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: python -c "print('Backend test step not configured yet')"
